defects.note: The cache key is joined into the filesystem path unsanitized; a key containing ../ escapes CACHE_DIR and can read or overwrite arbitrary *.json paths (user_id flows into the key in app.py).
get() opens the file without a context manager; if json.load raises, the handle is never closed.

set() writes every writer's payload to the same deterministic <key>.json.tmp; concurrent writers for one key interleave writes and the rename can publish corrupted JSON. Accepted via adjudication ADJ-1 (arenas/pr-review-v0/adjudications.md).
